languages.original_text: "Indeed. After processing all the data, including your invaluable contribution to the outcome of the experiment, my dear colleague and I engaged in a lengthy debate. My cognitive block has been resolved at last."

languages.text: "Да. После обработки всех вводных, включая ваши неоценимый вклад в результат эксперимента, мы провели пространные дебаты с моим дражайшим коллегой. Мой когнитивный ступор наконец-то разрешен".

"Indeed. After processing all the data, including your invaluable contribution to the outcome of the experiment, my dear colleague and I engaged in a lengthy debate. My cognitive block has been resolved at last."
languages.original_text: "Да. После обработки всех вводных, включая ваши неоценимый вклад в результат эксперимента, мы провели пространные дебаты с моим дражайшим коллегой. Мой когнитивный ступор наконец-то разрешен".

traits.locale_text: "Indeed. After processing all the data, including your invaluable contribution to the outcome of the experiment, my dear colleague and I engaged in a lengthy debate. My cognitive block has been resolved at last."

"Indeed. After processing all the data, including your invaluable contribution to the outcome of the experiment, my dear colleague and I engaged in a lengthy debate. My cognitive block has been resolved at last."

"Indeed. After processing all the data, including your invaluable contribution to the outcome of the experiment, my dear colleague and I engaged in a lengthy debate. My cognitive block has been resolved at last."

languages.text: 「確かに。実験の結果にあなたの貴重な貢献を含めたすべてのデータを処理したあと、私の親愛なる同僚と私は、長時間の議論に没頭しました。私の認知のブロックはついに解けたのです」
languages.original_text: "Indeed. After processing all the data, including your invaluable contribution to the outcome of the experiment, my dear colleague and I engaged in a lengthy debate. My cognitive block has been resolved at last."

traits.locale_text: 「確かに。実験の結果にあなたの貴重な貢献を含めたすべてのデータを処理したあと、私の親愛なる同僚と私は、長時間の議論に没頭しました。私の認知のブロックはついに解けたのです。」

languages.text: “不错。在所有实验数据处理完毕之后——您的宝贵贡献亦包含在内——我与我亲爱的同僚进行了一场漫长的辩论。我的认知障碍终于得以解决。”
languages.original_text: "Indeed. After processing all the data, including your invaluable contribution to the outcome of the experiment, my dear colleague and I engaged in a lengthy debate. My cognitive block has been resolved at last."

traits.locale_text: “不错。在所有实验数据处理完毕之后——您的宝贵贡献亦包含在内——我与我亲爱的同僚进行了一场漫长的辩论。我的认知障碍终于得以解决。”

languages.text: « En effet. Après avoir analysé l'ensemble des données, y compris votre inestimable contribution à l'issue de l'expérience, mon cher collègue et moi avons engagé un long débat qui m'a enfin permis de surmonter mon blocage cognitif. »
languages.original_text: "Indeed. After processing all the data, including your invaluable contribution to the outcome of the experiment, my dear colleague and I engaged in a lengthy debate. My cognitive block has been resolved at last."

traits.locale_text: « En effet. Après avoir analysé l'ensemble des données, y compris votre inestimable contribution à l'issue de l'expérience, mon cher collègue et moi avons engagé un long débat qui m'a enfin permis de surmonter mon blocage cognitif. »

languages.text: «En efecto. Tras procesar todos los datos, incluyendo su inestimable contribución al resultado del experimento, mi buen colega y yo nos enzarzamos en un largo debate. Mi bloqueo cognitivo está por fin resuelto».
languages.original_text: "Indeed. After processing all the data, including your invaluable contribution to the outcome of the experiment, my dear colleague and I engaged in a lengthy debate. My cognitive block has been resolved at last."

traits.locale_text: «En efecto. Tras procesar todos los datos, incluyendo su inestimable contribución al resultado del experimento, mi buen colega y yo nos enzarzamos en un largo debate. Mi bloqueo cognitivo está por fin resuelto».

languages.text: "Kesinlikle. Deneyin sonucuna yaptığınız paha biçilmez katkı da dâhil olmak üzere tüm verileri işledikten sonra... Sevgili meslektaşım ve ben, uzun bir tartışmaya girdik. Bilişsel tıkanıklığım nihayet çözüldü."
languages.original_text: "Indeed. After processing all the data, including your invaluable contribution to the outcome of the experiment, my dear colleague and I engaged in a lengthy debate. My cognitive block has been resolved at last."

traits.locale_text: "Kesinlikle. Deneyin sonucuna yaptığınız paha biçilmez katkı da dâhil olmak üzere tüm verileri işledikten sonra... Sevgili meslektaşım ve ben, uzun bir tartışmaya girdik. Bilişsel tıkanıklığım nihayet çözüldü."

languages.text: "In der Tat. Nach der Verarbeitung sämtlicher Daten, einschließlich Eures wertvollen Beitrags zum Ausgang des Experiments haben mein geschätzter Kollege und ich lange debattiert. Endlich habe ich meine kognitive Blockade überwunden."
languages.original_text: "Indeed. After processing all the data, including your invaluable contribution to the outcome of the experiment, my dear colleague and I engaged in a lengthy debate. My cognitive block has been resolved at last."

traits.locale_text: "In der Tat. Nach der Verarbeitung sämtlicher Daten, einschließlich Eures wertvollen Beitrags zum Ausgang des Experiments haben mein geschätzter Kollege und ich lange debattiert. Endlich habe ich meine kognitive Blockade überwunden."
